description: Per-team season trajectory in (attack, defence) space. Each line traces a club's signature — average points scored vs average points conceded per match — across every season they competed (1998–2024). League-average crosshairs split the space into four style quadrants (Strong attack & defence, Attacking only, Defensive grind, Struggling). Four signature clubs are colour-highlighted against the other thirteen rendered as a quiet grey backdrop. Combines connected-scatter, quadrant overlay, time-encoded markers and end-of-line labels.
